offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, delayed invoicing causes cash flow gaps. We streamline invoicing and payment tracking instead of manual invoicing and tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Cash flow gaps due to delayed invoicing and payment tracking.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers

pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
